context_only: # ac -- Agentic Commits: Hunk-Based Atomic Commits for AI Agents
### 6.2 Validation Errors (Exit 2 -- before any git mutation)
## 12. What This Spec Does NOT Cover

tasks.title: Initialize Go module with dependencies
tasks.acceptance:
- go.mod exists with module github.com/deligoez/ac
- Dependencies: cobra, go-gitdiff, go-isatty, fatih/color
- go mod tidy succeeds
tasks.closed_reason: go.mod created with module github.com/deligoez/ac. Dependencies (cobra, go-gitdiff, go-isatty, fatih/color) installed via go get. go mod tidy succeeds.

tasks.title: Define exit code constants
tasks.acceptance:
- internal/cli/exitcodes.go defines ExitSuccess=0, ExitValidation=2, ExitExecution=3
- No exit code 1 (per spec Section 5.6)
tasks.closed_reason: internal/cli/exitcodes.go defines ExitSuccess=0, ExitValidation=2, ExitExecution=3. No exit code 1.

tasks.title: Output types for results
tasks.acceptance:
- internal/output/output.go defines Result, CommitResult, FileResult types per Section 8.3
- Structured error type with error, code, hint fields (Section 6.1)
- TTY detection via go-isatty with JSON/TTY output helpers
tasks.closed_reason: internal/output/output.go defines Result, CommitResult, FileResult per Section 8.3. ACError with error/code/hint. Printer with TTY detection via go-isatty, JSON/TTY helpers.

tasks.title: Cobra root command with flags
tasks.acceptance:
- cmd/ac/main.go entry point calling cobra root
- internal/cli/root.go has --json, --quiet, --no-color global flags
- ac help prints usage and go build ./cmd/ac/ succeeds
tasks.closed_reason: cmd/ac/main.go calls cli.Execute(). internal/cli/root.go has cobra root with --json, --quiet, --no-color flags, version subcommand. ac help prints usage. go build ./cmd/ac/ succeeds.

tasks.title: Plan JSON types definition
tasks.acceptance:
- internal/plan/plan.go defines Plan, Commit, FileEntry types
- FileEntry.Hunks is []int with omitempty (nil = full-file)
- Plan.AllowUnplanned is []string with omitempty
tasks.closed_reason: internal/plan/plan.go defines Plan, Commit, FileEntry. FileEntry.Hunks is []int with omitempty (nil=full-file). Plan.AllowUnplanned is []string with omitempty. IsFullFile() helper.

tasks.title: Parse plan JSON with errors
tasks.acceptance:
- plan.Parse(json) returns Plan or structured error with hint
- Validates required fields: commits array, message, files, path
- Tests 35-41 pass (valid plan, full-file, empty hunks, invalid JSON, missing commits, empty commits, missing path)
tasks.closed_reason: internal/plan/parse.go: Parse(json) returns Plan or ACError. Tests 35-41 pass: valid plan, full-file, empty hunks normalized to nil, invalid JSON, missing commits, empty commits, missing path.

tasks.title: Validate plan field constraints
tasks.acceptance:
- Validates: negative hunk index, duplicate in same file, cross-commit duplicates (tests 42-44)
- Validates: empty message, empty files, path safety (non-empty, relative, no ..)
- Validates: full-file in multiple commits, mixed full-file/hunk-select errors
tasks.closed_reason: internal/plan/validate.go: ValidateFields checks negative hunks, duplicates, empty message/files, path safety, full-file/hunk-select conflicts. Tests 42-44 plus edge cases pass.

tasks.title: Diff types for FileDiff Hunk
tasks.acceptance:
- internal/diff/parse.go defines FileDiff with Path, Hunks, IsBinary, IsNew, IsDeleted, IsRenamed, OldPath, OldMode, NewMode
- Hunk type with Index, OldStart, OldCount, NewStart, NewCount, Lines, Fingerprint
- Line type with Op (Add/Delete/Context) and Content
tasks.closed_reason: internal/diff/types.go defines FileDiff (Path, Hunks, IsBinary, IsNew, IsDeleted, IsRenamed, OldPath, OldMode, NewMode), Hunk (Index, OldStart, OldCount, NewStart, NewCount, Lines, Fingerprint), Line (Op, Content) types.

tasks.title: Parse basic diff headers
tasks.acceptance:
- diff.Parse wraps go-gitdiff to parse git diff -U0 output
- Tests 1-5 pass: @@ headers, omitted count, pure add, pure delete, multi-file
- Tests 6-7 pass: new file (--- /dev/null), deleted file (+++ /dev/null)
tasks.closed_reason: internal/diff/parse.go wraps go-gitdiff. Tests 1-7 pass: @@ headers, omitted count, pure add/delete, multi-file, new file, deleted file.

tasks.title: Parse binary rename mode diffs
tasks.acceptance:
- Test 8: binary file sets IsBinary=true
- Tests 9-10: rename captures OldPath/IsRenamed, mode change captures OldMode/NewMode
- Tests 11-12: no-newline-at-EOF marker handled, empty diff returns empty slice
tasks.closed_reason: Tests 8-12 pass: binary IsBinary, rename OldPath/IsRenamed, mode change OldMode/NewMode, no-newline-at-EOF handled, empty diff returns empty slice.

tasks.title: Content fingerprinting for hunks
tasks.acceptance:
- internal/diff/fingerprint.go: SHA-256 with ordered lines, '-'/'+' prefixed, '||' separator
- Tests 13-15: same content/diff lines = same fp, diff content = diff fp, diff deletions = diff fp
- Tests 16-17: shuffled lines = different fp (order-dependent), empty hunk = stable fp
tasks.closed_reason: internal/diff/fingerprint.go: SHA-256 with ordered lines, -/+ prefixed, || separator. Tests 13-17 pass: same content=same fp, diff content=diff fp, shuffled=diff fp (order-dependent), empty hunk stable.

tasks.title: Match hunks by fingerprint
tasks.acceptance:
- internal/diff/match.go: MatchHunks maps original to current by fingerprint
- Identical hunks disambiguated: smallest |old_start diff|, smaller old_start for ties, greedy (Section 3.8)
- Tests 18-21: 1:1 mapping, fewer hunks matched, identical disambiguation, no match = error
tasks.closed_reason: internal/diff/match.go: MatchHunks with greedy fingerprint matching, OldStart proximity disambiguation. Tests 18-21 pass.

tasks.title: Build patches with delta accumulation
tasks.acceptance:
- internal/patch/build.go: BuildPatch with correct diff/mode/rename headers (Section 8.4)
- Delta accumulation: skip accumulates delta (old_count - new_count) then selected hunks adjust new_start
- Tests 22-26: all hunks, first only, last only, [0,2] from 4, [1,3] from 4
tasks.closed_reason: internal/patch/build.go: BuildPatch with correct headers and delta accumulation. Tests 22-26 pass: all hunks, first only, last only, [0,2] from 4, [1,3] from 4.

tasks.title: Patch edge cases in delta
tasks.acceptance:
- Tests 27-28: skip add-lines (negative delta), skip delete-lines (positive delta)
- Test 29: skip equal old/new count = delta unchanged
- Test 30: single-line hunk count=1 handled
tasks.closed_reason: Tests 27-30 pass: skip add-lines (negative delta), skip delete-lines (positive delta), equal count (zero delta), single-line hunk.

tasks.title: Apply patches via git apply
tasks.acceptance:
- internal/patch/apply.go: pipes patch to git apply --cached --unidiff-zero
- Supports GIT_INDEX_FILE env var for temp index
- Tests 31-34: valid apply, adjusted lines, new file after add -N, invalid = error with stderr
tasks.closed_reason: internal/patch/apply.go: pipes to git apply --cached --unidiff-zero with GIT_INDEX_FILE support. Tests 31-34 pass: valid apply, adjusted lines, new file after add-N, invalid=error.

tasks.title: Git repository detection helpers
tasks.acceptance:
- internal/git/git.go: Run(args) wrapper for os/exec with stderr capture
- EnsureRepo() returns error if not in git repo
- EnsureCleanStaging() returns error if git diff --cached has output
tasks.closed_reason: internal/git/git.go: Runner with Run/RunWithStdin wrapping os/exec with stderr capture. EnsureRepo via rev-parse --git-dir. EnsureCleanStaging via diff --cached --quiet.

tasks.title: Git diff commit helper functions
tasks.acceptance:
- internal/git/diff.go: Diff(flags...) runs git diff with given flags, returns output
- internal/git/commit.go: Commit(msg) runs git commit -m, returns SHA from output
- Helpers for IntentToAdd, RevertIntentToAdd, IsUntracked (git ls-files)
tasks.closed_reason: internal/git/diff.go: Diff(flags), DiffFile(path, flags), IsUntracked (ls-files --others --exclude-standard), IntentToAdd, RevertIntentToAdd. internal/git/commit.go: Commit(msg) returns SHA, Add(path), ResetHead.

tasks.title: Validate complete coverage of plan
tasks.acceptance:
- internal/plan/validate.go: validates every hunk assigned to exactly one commit
- Tests 45-49: all assigned=valid, file not in diff=error, hunk OOR=error, binary+hunks=error, untracked full-file=valid
- Tests 50-52: untracked+hunks=valid after add-N, missing file=error, missing hunks=error
tasks.closed_reason: internal/plan/validate.go: ValidateCoverage checks file existence, hunk OOR, binary+hunks, complete coverage. Tests 45-52 pass.

tasks.title: Validate allow_unplanned glob matching
tasks.acceptance:
- allow_unplanned paths excluded from coverage check (test 53)
- Glob patterns match via filepath.Match (test 54)
- Duplicate hunk across commits detected (test 55)
tasks.closed_reason: ValidateCoverage supports allow_unplanned via filepath.Match. Tests 53-55 pass: excluded paths, glob patterns, duplicate across commits.

tasks.title: ac diff command implementation
tasks.acceptance:
- internal/cli/diff.go: 'ac diff' runs git diff -U0 -M, lists indexed hunks + untracked files
- JSON output with files/hunks/summary, is_new/is_deleted/is_renamed/is_binary/is_untracked fields
- TTY output with colored formatting, staged-changes warning, exits 2 if no changes
tasks.closed_reason: internal/cli/diff.go: ac diff runs git diff -U0 -M, lists indexed hunks + untracked files. JSON/TTY output with is_new/is_deleted/is_renamed/is_binary/is_untracked. Staged-changes warning. Exits 2 if no changes.

tasks.title: ac diff command tests
tasks.acceptance:
- Tests 68-70: modified file indexed, new file is_new, deleted file is_deleted
- Tests 71-72: binary without hunks, multiple files with indices
- Test 73: JSON output valid with summary object
tasks.closed_reason: Tests 68-73 pass: modified file indexed, new file is_new, deleted file is_deleted, binary without hunks, multiple files with indices, JSON output valid with summary.

tasks.title: ac run Phase 1 validation
tasks.acceptance:
- internal/cli/run.go: ac run parses plan from file or stdin (-)
- Phase 1: repo check, staging check, parse plan, git add -N, diff capture, validate, temp-index dry-run
- On validation failure: reverts git add -N, exits 2 with structured error
tasks.closed_reason: internal/cli/run.go: ac run with Phase 1 validation. Parses plan from file/stdin, repo check, staging check, git add -N, diff capture, validate, temp-index sequential dry-run. Reverts add-N on failure. go build succeeds.

tasks.title: ac run Phase 2 execution
tasks.acceptance:
- Phase 2: for each commit, re-diff per file, fingerprint match, build adjusted patch, apply, commit
- On apply error: git reset HEAD --, on commit error: leave staging intact, cleanup orphaned add-N
- Returns Result with committed count, SHAs, per-commit status
tasks.closed_reason: Phase 2 implemented in run.go: executePlan iterates commits, executeCommit handles full-file (Add) and hunk-select (re-diff, fingerprint match, BuildPatch, Apply). Error recovery: apply failure resets HEAD, commit failure leaves staging intact. Orphaned add-N cleanup. go build succeeds.

tasks.title: ac run --dry-run mode
tasks.closed_reason: --dry-run flag runs Phase 1 only, returns DryRunResult with valid, commits, files, hunks_total, hunks_assigned, issues. No commits created.

tasks.title: ac run integration tests
tasks.acceptance:
- Tests 56-60: single file, multiple files, split by hunks, mixed strategies, 5-hunk scenario
- Tests 61-64: new file, deleted file, renamed file, allow_unplanned
- Tests 65-67: dry-run, stdin input, TTY vs pipe output
tasks.closed_reason: internal/cli/run_test.go: Tests 56-60 (single file, multiple files, split by hunks, mixed, 5-hunk), 61-62 (new file, deleted), 63 (skip rename), 64 (allow_unplanned), 65 (dry-run), 66-67 (stdin note, TTY skip). 2 bugs fixed during testing.

tasks.title: Polish TTY/JSON output formatting
tasks.acceptance:
- Colored TTY output via fatih/color with NO_COLOR and --no-color support
- --quiet suppresses info messages and --json forces JSON on TTY
- Non-TTY auto-detects JSON format
tasks.closed_reason: Output formatting already implemented in diff.go and run.go: colored TTY via fatih/color, NO_COLOR and --no-color support, --quiet suppresses info, --json forces JSON, non-TTY auto-detects JSON. Test 67 skipped (format detection is tested implicitly).

tasks.title: Create agent skill SKILL.md
tasks.acceptance:
- skills/ac/SKILL.md with metadata, activation rules, workflow (diff -> plan -> run)
- Plan writing rules, common patterns, error recovery (Sections 9.4-9.6)
- Key commands table (Section 9.7)
tasks.closed_reason: skills/ac/SKILL.md created with metadata, activation rules, 3-step workflow (diff->plan->run), plan writing rules (Section 9.4), common patterns (Section 9.5), error recovery (Section 9.6), key commands (Section 9.7).
